data.name: Kinky Fight Club 2
data.detailed_description:
Step into the ring where pleasure is power, and the first to cum loses!

Kinky Fight Club 2 is a unique JRPG where battles are fought with eroticism, not fists. Engage in intense sexfights — erotic one-on-one duels where victory means pushing your opponent to climax before you do.

This is a fully customizable adult game that puts you in control. Create your ideal fighters, define their roles, and choose exactly the kind of content you want to see — whether it's male, female, futanari, or a mix of all three. You only experience what you consent to.

With over 125 high-quality 3D animations, an expansive wardrobe (over 700 items!), and a deep combat system built around sexual domination, Kinky Fight Club 2 offers an adult experience like no other.

 Key Features

  • Fully Customizable Adult Content
    Choose what you want to see — and hide what you don’t. Includes options for gender combinations, roles, positions, and fetishes.

  • Dynamic Role & Gender System
    Mr. Zed’s signature system lets you define how your characters act, react, and dominate.

  • Deep Character Creation
    Build your fighter from the ground up with hundreds of clothing items, customize their appearance, attributes, abilities and passive talents! Create well-rounded fighters, or the most broken combos!

  • Erotic Combat System
    Combine sex positions, attributes, and abilities to defeat your opponent in orgasmic submission, this is a very interactive game!

  • Or sit down and relax
    Enjoy taking the decisions in combat, both in turn-based or real-time, or just sit down, and enjoy seeing the action, either on watch mode, or on the gallery

  • Original Soundtrack
    Sexy, chill beats to fuck — and fight — to.

  • 125+ Unique Adult Animations
    Wrestling-themed sex positions, BDSM, threesomes, and more (all optional and toggleable)

  • 70+ Unique restraints for bondage
    Select among a long list of restraints for characters to be able to use in the game, customize the appearance and even colors of the restraints! (or don’t select any and you won’t see any bondage)

  • Endless Replayability
    Create, customize, and share unlimited characters with the community.


---------------------------

No kinks are forced, and no content is shown without your permission. Whether you're here for fantasy domination, character creation, or strategic sex-based combat, Kinky Fight Club 2 is built to satisfy.

If you are into femdom, maledom, wrestling, bondage, or just gameplay based adult games, then this game is 100% for you!

data.short_description: Join the Kinky Fight Club, where sex is a competitive sport! Set the rules, customize your appereance, abilities and skills and get ready for intense matches to wrestle and seduce your way to the top and become the champion!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel core i3 2.8ghz
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel hd integrated graphics or better
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: The game is a bit video memory heavy, 14+ gb is recommended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel core i3 2.8ghz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 備註: The game is a bit video memory heavy, 14+ gb is recommended.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1+, 8, 10
  • Processor: Intel core i3 2.8ghz
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel hd integrated graphics or better
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game is a bit video memory heavy, 14+ gb is recommended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1+, 8, 10
  • Processor: Intel core i3 2.8ghz
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Additional Notes: The game is a bit video memory heavy, 14+ gb is recommended.
